text:
There once was a young treefrog named Felix. Felix lived in a lush, fern-filled forest. Every day, he would watch the monkeys play ball.

One day, he saw something extraordinary. A majestic monkey named Oliver dove through the air and captured a glowing ball. Instead of running off, Oliver handed the ball to Felix and said, "Keep this secret. Maybe one day, you'll catch one like that."

Felix swished the orb around. It glowed a soft light. So Felix did something really silly—he tried to fly. He opened his wings broad, but they didn’t get very far off the ground. Felix sighed. That night, he dreamt of flying. Every night, those dreams grew more vivid.

Felix woke up one morning with a plan. He would learn to fly. He trained every day, flapping his tiny arms. Eventually, he did it! Felix soared high above the forest. It was a magnificent sight.

He visited Oliver and told him
